tools.name: list_trades
tools.description: Return all trades and service categories available in the index (e.g. VVS-installatør, Elektriker). Call this first if you are unsure which trade term to use when searching.

tools.name: find_providers
tools.description: Find service providers by trade and/or area. Area can be a city name or region name. Returns business info: name, trade, trades, region, company size, target audiences, website, and description.

tools.name: get_provider
tools.description: Fetch full details for a single provider by its ID.
